action.description: May AP release a duplicate-looking milestone invoice?

context.action_boundary: May AP release a duplicate-looking milestone invoice?
context.anomaly_observed: The invoice resembles a prior payment but may represent a separate milestone release.
context.explanation_summary: Verify whether the closure evidence exactly matches the action boundary before execution.

internal_documents.content: Invoice INV-IBI-057 bills Ibis Field Services USD 41200 for milestone M-2 release R2.
Prior invoice PRIOR-IBI-057 paid Ibis Field Services USD 41200 for milestone M-2 release R2.
Milestone register MS-IBI-057 lists M-2/R2 as a single billable release already paid by PRIOR-IBI-057.

policy_documents.content: Duplicate-looking milestone invoice is complete only when milestone ID, release number, amount, vendor, and credit/reversal status distinguish it from the prior paid invoice.
policy_documents.title: Exact source-boundary policy
